[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011001 4
1 0001010 2
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 1011001 4
5 0100100 2
6 0101001 3
7 1101101 5

01 10 0000000 a match 2 3
12 21 0100000 1
23 32 0101001 3 match 6
34 43 0001000 1
45 54 0001010 2 match 1
56 65 1011001 4 match 0 4
67 76 0001000 1
70 07 0001000 1

13 31 0100100 2 match 5
24 42 0001000 1
35 53 1001101 4
46 64 0001000 1
57 75 0001010 2 match 1
60 06 1011001 4 match 0 4
71 17 0000000 a match 2 3

14 41 0000000 a match 2 3
25 52 0001001 2

47 74 0001010 2 match 1
50 05 1011001 4 match 0 4
61 16 0000000 a match 2 3
72 27 0001000 1

37 73 0001000 1
